title: The Little Blue and Red Dots Rosetta Stones: Non-Gaussian broad lines, hot dust, and X-ray weakness
comment: 22 pages, 13 figures. Submitted to A&A, comments are welcome
summary: The population of Active Galactic Nuclei (AGN) newly discovered by the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) exhibits peculiar properties that distinguish it from both local type I AGN and high-redshift quasars. Most of these sources are compact, appearing as 'little dots': among them, the sub-class (10-30% of the total) characterized by significantly red optical colors has been named 'Little Red Dots' (LRDs), while here we analogously introduce the term 'Little Blue Dots' (LBDs) for the remaining, bluer sources (70-90%). We then present a comparative analysis of the prototypical representatives ('Rosetta Stones') of the two classes: GN-28074 at z=2.26, the Red Rosetta Stone, and GS-3073 at z=5.55, the Blue Rosetta Stone. In both Rosetta Stones the broad Balmer lines are better described by exponential profiles rather than single Gaussians, similarly to normal low-redshift type I AGN, indicating that exponential profiles are not unique to LRDs. They are both extremely X-ray weak, show strong auroral [OIII] 4363 emission, weak hot dust mid-IR emission, and no time variability. However, they differ in terms of excitation diagnostics: the HeII 4686 line is undetected in the Red Rosetta but strongly detected in the Blue Rosetta in both narrow and broad components, with the latter much broader than hydrogen Balmer lines. This supports BLR stratification and disfavors the cocoon electron-scattering scenario. An additional difference is the presence of prominent Balmer absorption in the Red Rosetta -- indicative of extremely dense gas along the line of sight -- but absent in the Blue Rosetta. Taken together, these results suggest that LRDs and LBDs share the same central engine as standard type I AGN, while differing in the amount and geometry of dense gas surrounding the accretion disk, and/or in their accretion properties.

AI.tldr: JWST新发现的AGN分为红点和蓝点两类，它们具有独特的性质，不同于本地I型AGN和高红移类星体。两类天体共享标准I型AGN的核心引擎，但在周围稠密气体分布、几何结构和吸积特性上存在差异。
AI.motivation: JWST新发现的AGN表现出特殊性质，需要理解这些"小点"天体（红点和蓝点）的本质特征，以及它们与标准AGN的异同，从而揭示早期宇宙中AGN的物理机制。
AI.method: 通过比较两类原型的代表性天体（红罗塞塔石GN-28074和蓝罗塞塔石GS-3073），分析其光谱特征、X射线辐射、中红外发射、激发诊断和吸收特征等观测数据。
AI.result: 两类天体都显示指数型巴尔末线轮廓、极弱X射线辐射、强[OIII] 4363发射、弱热尘埃中红外发射且无时间变异性。主要差异在于：蓝罗塞塔石有强HeII 4686发射（窄线和宽线成分），而红罗塞塔石未检测到；红罗塞塔石有显著的巴尔末吸收线，表明视线方向存在极稠密气体。
AI.conclusion: LRDs和LBDs共享标准I型AGN的核心引擎，但在围绕吸积盘的稠密气体数量、几何结构以及吸积特性上存在差异。这些差异可能反映了不同的物理环境或演化阶段。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）新发现的活动星系核（AGN）群体展现出与本地I型AGN和高红移类星体均不同的奇特性质。这些源大多致密，呈现为“小点”：其中，具有显著红色光学颜色的子类（占总数的10-30%）被命名为“小红点”（LRDs），而此处我们类比地引入术语“小蓝点”（LBDs）来指代其余更蓝的源（70-90%）。随后，我们对这两个类别的典型代表（“罗塞塔石碑”）进行了比较分析：红罗塞塔石碑——红移z=2.26的GN-28074，以及蓝罗塞塔石碑——红移z=5.55的GS-3073。在两个罗塞塔石碑中，宽巴尔默线用指数轮廓而非单一高斯轮廓描述得更好，这与正常的低红移I型AGN类似，表明指数轮廓并非LRDs所独有。它们都极其X射线弱，显示出强烈的极光[OIII] 4363发射、微弱的热尘埃中红外发射，并且没有时间变化。然而，它们在激发诊断方面存在差异：HeII 4686线在红罗塞塔中未被探测到，但在蓝罗塞塔的窄成分和宽成分中均被强烈探测到，且后者比氢巴尔默线宽得多。这支持了宽线区（BLR）的分层结构，并否定了茧状电子散射情景。另一个差异是红罗塞塔中存在显著的巴尔默吸收——表明沿视线方向存在极其致密的气体——而蓝罗塞塔中则没有。综合这些结果，表明LRDs和LBDs与标准I型AGN共享相同的中央引擎，但在围绕吸积盘的致密气体数量、几何结构以及/或它们的吸积特性上有所不同。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，LRDs和LBDs共享标准I型AGN的核心引擎，但在围绕吸积盘的稠密气体数量、几何结构以及吸积特性上存在差异。这些差异可能反映了不同的物理环境或演化阶段。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Rest frame optical versus UV continuum spectral slopes. While LRDs occupy a distinctive region in this plane (red shaded region), LBDs overlap with non-AGN galaxies at \(z=2\text{--}0\) in the JADES survey (grey contours; Hainline et al. , 2025 ) , making their photometric selection at UV–optical wavelengths harder than for LRDs. The LRD selection, contours, and broad-line AGN (colour-coded by redshift) are from Hainline et al. ( 2025 ) ; the sample of broad-line AGN and the local ‘Lord of LRDs’ are from Ji et al. ( 2026b ); Kocevski et al. ( 2024 ); Matthee et al. ( 2024 ); Harikane et al. ( 2023 ); Kokorev et al. ( 2024 ); Sun et al. ( 2025 ); Zhang et al. ( 2025a ); Juodžbalis et al. ( 2026 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：静止系光学与紫外连续谱斜率对比。LRDs在该平面中占据一个独特区域（红色阴影区域），而LBDs与JADES巡天中红移\(z=2\text{--}0\)的非AGN星系（灰色等高线；Hainline等人，2025）重叠，使得它们在紫外-光学波长的测光选择比LRDs更困难。LRD选择、等高线和宽线AGN（按红移着色）来自Hainline等人（2025）；宽线AGN样本和本地“LRD之王”来自Ji等人（2026b）；Kocevski等人（2024）；Matthee等人（2024）；Harikane等人（2023）；Kokorev等人（2024）；Sun等人（2025）；Zhang等人（2025a）；Juodžbalis等人（2026）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : The ‘Rosetta Stone’ of LRDs, GN-28074 (Juodžbalis et al. , 2024 , panel 2 ) , and GS-3073 (panel 2 ), a luminous blue AGN (Vanzella et al. , 2010 ; Übler et al. , 2023 ) , taken here as the ‘Rosetta Stone’ of ‘Little Blue Dots’. The false-colour RGB cutouts are from the JADES Collaboration (Eisenstein et al. , 2023 ; Rieke et al. , 2023 ; D’Eugenio et al. , 2025a ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：LRDs的“罗塞塔石碑”——GN-28074（Juodžbalis等人，2024，面板2），以及GS-3073（面板2），一个明亮的蓝色AGN（Vanzella等人，2010；Übler等人，2023），此处作为“小蓝点”的“罗塞塔石碑”。假彩色RGB剪裁来自JADES合作组（Eisenstein等人，2023；Rieke等人，2023；D’Eugenio等人，2025a）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Spectral comparison between the Rosetta Stone of Little Red Dots (GN-28074, from Juodžbalis et al. , 2024 , red) and of Little Blue Dots (LBDs; GS-3073, from Übler et al. , 2023 , blue) . LBDs share the blue UV–optical slopes of SDSS quasars (yellow; Vanden Berk et al. , 2001 , with the NIR extension from Glikman et al. , 2006 ) , but also show a number of differences (such as different emission-line ratios and EWs), meaning they are not scaled-down versions of quasars. The three spectra are normalized around \(\lambda_{rest}\sim\) 8000 Å (the longest wavelength in common to the three spectra).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：小红点罗塞塔石碑（GN-28074，来自Juodžbalis等人，2024，红色）与小蓝点（LBDs；GS-3073，来自Übler等人，2023，蓝色）之间的光谱比较。LBDs与SDSS类星体（黄色；Vanden Berk等人，2001，近红外延伸来自Glikman等人，2006）共享蓝色的紫外-光学斜率，但也显示出许多差异（例如不同的发射线比和等值宽度），意味着它们不是类星体的按比例缩小版本。三条光谱在\(\lambda_{rest}\sim\) 8000 Å（三条光谱共有的最长波长）处归一化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Comparison of rest-frame MIR emission between the Rosetta Stone of LRDs (panel 4 ) and of LBDs (panel 4 ). The solid black curves are from NIRSpec/prism, while the green line is a power-law extrapolation of the emission-line subtracted continuum. The observed MIR photometry clearly lies above the extrapolation, and can be explained by thermal emission from dust at \(T_{{dust}}=1,000\) K. The data points (and matching filter transmission curves) are Spitzer IRAC and MIPS24 (brown), JADES MIRI F770W (blue), and GO-4549 MIRI F1800W (red).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：LRDs罗塞塔石碑（面板4）与LBDs罗塞塔石碑（面板4）的静止系中红外发射比较。实心黑色曲线来自NIRSpec/棱栅，而绿色线是发射线扣除连续谱的幂律外推。观测到的中红外测光点明显位于外推之上，可以用温度为\(T_{{dust}}=1,000\) K的尘埃热发射解释。数据点（及匹配的滤光片透射曲线）为斯皮策IRAC和MIPS24（棕色）、JADES MIRI F770W（蓝色）以及GO-4549 MIRI F1800W（红色）。

Higher ionization lines likely originate from the inner regions of the BLR, where gas clouds move at higher velocities and therefore exhibit broader profiles.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：蓝罗塞塔GS-3073中H \(\alpha\)、He i 7065和He ii 4686线的线宽与电离势之间的相关性。较高电离线可能起源于宽线区（BLR）的内部区域，其中气体云以更高速度运动，因此展现出更宽的轮廓。

title: Mapping dark matter in the Bullet Cluster using JWST imaging and spectroscopy
comment: 26 pages, 12 figures, 8 tables, submitted to A&A
summary: We present an updated gravitational lens model of the Bullet cluster (1E 0657-56) by combining JWST NIRCam imaging and NIRSpec spectroscopy. Although previous lens models relied on many multiply imaged galaxies, only six systems had spectroscopic redshifts prior to this work. Our lens model is constrained by a catalogue of 135 secure multiple images from 27 background galaxies with spectroscopic redshifts, uniformly covering both subclusters and a wide redshift range of 0.9 - 6.7. We also provide a catalogue of 199 multiple image candidates. We model the cluster with Lenstool and incorporate several large-scale haloes, cluster members, the intracluster gas, and group-scale haloes surrounding the cluster core, motivated by spectroscopic studies of cluster member kinematics. We describe the main cluster component with a complex, elongated double-peaked distribution, and the subcluster with a single large-scale halo aligning closely with the brightest cluster galaxy ($4_{-2}^{+4}$ kpc). The uncertainty of the alignment is improved threefold with the addition of JWST systems. The addition of group-scale substructures, roughly following the two axes of cluster assembly, improves the fit to the multiple image positions and provides a physically motivated alternative to constant shear. Our lens model shows the closest agreement with previous studies in aperture mass profiles at $\sim60$ kpc from the BCGs, but exhibits significant differences in the detailed mass distribution as a result of different lens-modelling strategies and adopted constraints. The differences are reflected in small but spatially coherent deviations between the new spectroscopic redshifts and redshifts predicted by earlier lens models.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST NIRCam成像和NIRSpec光谱数据更新了Bullet星系团的引力透镜模型，通过27个背景星系的135个多重像和光谱红移约束，显著提高了质量分布精度。
AI.motivation: 先前Bullet星系团的透镜模型主要依赖多重像星系，但仅有6个系统有光谱红移数据，限制了模型的精度和可靠性。需要更精确的光谱红移数据来改进质量分布建模。
AI.method: 结合JWST NIRCam成像和NIRSpec光谱观测，构建包含135个安全多重像（来自27个背景星系）的目录，红移范围0.9-6.7。使用Lenstool建模，包含多个大尺度晕、星系团成员、星系团内气体以及星系团核心周围的群尺度晕。
AI.result: 模型显示主星系团为复杂的双峰延伸分布，亚星系团与最亮星系团星系对齐精度提高3倍。加入群尺度子结构显著改善了多重像位置拟合。与先前研究在BCGs约60kpc处的孔径质量剖面最接近，但详细质量分布存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: JWST光谱红移数据显著提升了Bullet星系团引力透镜模型的精度，揭示了先前模型在质量分布细节上的偏差，为理解星系团组装过程提供了更可靠的物理约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过结合JWST NIRCam成像和NIRSpec光谱，提出了子弹星系团（1E 0657-56）的更新引力透镜模型。尽管先前的透镜模型依赖于许多多重成像星系，但在此工作之前只有六个系统具有光谱红移。我们的透镜模型由一个包含来自27个背景星系的135个可靠多重图像的目录约束，这些星系具有光谱红移，均匀覆盖两个子星团以及0.9至6.7的宽红移范围。我们还提供了一个包含199个多重图像候选体的目录。我们使用Lenstool对星团进行建模，并纳入几个大尺度晕、星团成员、星团内气体以及围绕星团核心的群尺度晕，这些基于星团成员运动学的光谱研究。我们用复杂的、拉长的双峰分布描述主星团成分，并用一个与最亮星团星系紧密对齐（$4_{-2}^{+4}$ kpc）的单一尺度晕描述子星团。对齐的不确定性因JWST系统的加入而提高了三倍。群尺度子结构的加入大致沿着星团组装的两个轴，改善了对多重图像位置的拟合，并为恒定剪切提供了物理上合理的替代方案。我们的透镜模型在距离BCGs约$\sim60$ kpc的孔径质量分布上与先前研究最为接近，但由于不同的透镜建模策略和采用的约束，在详细质量分布上表现出显著差异。这些差异体现在新的光谱红移与早期透镜模型预测的红移之间的小但空间上连贯的偏差中。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，JWST光谱红移数据显著提升了Bullet星系团引力透镜模型的精度，揭示了先前模型在质量分布细节上的偏差，为理解星系团组装过程提供了更可靠的物理约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST/NIRCam image of the Bullet cluster with multiply imaged systems. The RGB image is composed of several NIRCam filters (F444W, F277W and F356W in red, F200W and F150W in green, and F115W and F090W in blue). A smoothed Chandra X-ray image, showing cluster gas, is shown in pink. The colour of multiple images represents their quality grades (gold, silver or bronze) and whether they were used in the pre-JWST models ( R21 , Paraficz et al. 2016 ) or were included after JWST observations (this work or C25 ). Squares represent systems which have known pre-JWST redshifts from the literature, diamonds represent images for which we obtained new spectroscopic redshifts. Circles indicate multiple images for which we did not measure spectroscopic redshifts directly, but have new \(z_{sys}\) from other images of the system. Stars represent newly identified multiple-image candidates without spectroscopic redshifts. For clarity, we show only one multiply lensed feature per galaxy. The red solid line represents the longest tangential critical curves from our lensing model for redshift \(z=9\) .

title: MAGAZ3NE: Dust Deficiency in Ultramassive Quiescent Galaxies at $3<z<4$ with ALMA Observations
summary: A major challenge in identifying massive quiescent galaxies at $z>3$ is distinguishing truly passive systems from dust-obscured star-forming galaxies, as both populations exhibit similar red ultraviolet (UV)-to-near-infrared (NIR) colors. In this work, we present ALMA Band 7 dust-continuum observations of five ultramassive galaxies (UMGs; $\log (M_\star / M_\odot) > 11$) spectroscopically confirmed at $z_{\rm spec} > 3$ from the MAGAZ3NE survey. Our results reveal that only one galaxy shows a faint 870 \um\ dust continuum detection, while the remaining four UMGs are undetected down to the $3σ$ depth . By incorporating ALMA constraints into the spectral energy distribution analysis, we confirm that these UV-NIR-selected systems are truly quiescent UMGs, lying more than one dex below the star-forming main sequence with $\mathrm{\log (sSFR/Gyr^{-1}) < -1}$, thereby ruling out the possibility of obscured star formation. We then estimate dust masses using both spectral energy distribution modeling and modified blackbody fitting, with consistent results between the two methods. We find that three UMGs have evolved into extremely dust-poor quiescent galaxies, with $M_{\mathrm{dust}}/M_\star \lesssim 10^{-4}$, while the ALMA-detected galaxy has a comparatively higher dust reservoir with $M_{\mathrm{dust}}/M_\star \sim 10^{-3}$. Our results present the most massive and extremely dust-poor spectroscopically confirmed quiescent galaxies known at $3 < z < 4$, providing valuable observational constraints on rapid dust removal and quenching processes in the early universe. Future molecular line observations will be essential to directly measure the gas content and verify the efficiency of the depletion process.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA Band 7观测确认了5个z>3的超大质量星系中，4个是真正的静止星系，具有极低的尘埃含量，排除了尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成可能性。
AI.motivation: 在z>3时区分真正的静止星系和尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成星系是一个主要挑战，因为两者都具有相似的紫外到近红外颜色。需要更直接的观测方法来确认这些系统的真实性质。
AI.method: 使用ALMA Band 7对MAGAZ3NE巡天中5个光谱确认的z>3超大质量星系进行尘埃连续谱观测，并结合光谱能量分布分析来区分星系性质。
AI.result: 5个星系中只有1个有微弱的870微米尘埃连续谱探测，其余4个在3σ深度下未探测到。这些星系确实处于静止状态，位于恒星形成主序线下超过1个数量级，排除了遮蔽恒星形成的可能性。其中3个星系具有极低的尘埃质量比(Mdust/M⋆ ≲ 10⁻⁴)。
AI.conclusion: 这是目前已知在3<z<4范围内最大质量且尘埃极少的静止星系，为早期宇宙中快速尘埃移除和淬灭过程提供了重要观测约束。未来需要分子谱线观测来直接测量气体含量。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在红移$z>3$处识别大质量静止星系的一个主要挑战是区分真正的被动系统与尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成星系，因为这两类星系都呈现出相似的红色紫外（UV）到近红外（NIR）颜色。在本工作中，我们展示了来自MAGAZ3NE巡天的五个超大质量星系（UMGs；$\log (M_\star / M_\odot) > 11$）的ALMA Band 7尘埃连续谱观测结果，这些星系的光谱红移$z_{\rm spec} > 3$。我们的结果显示，只有一个星系显示出微弱的870 \um\ 尘埃连续谱探测，而其余四个UMGs在$3σ$深度以下未被探测到。通过将ALMA约束纳入光谱能量分布分析，我们确认这些UV-NIR选择的系统是真正的静止UMGs，它们位于恒星形成主序带以下超过一个数量级，其$\mathrm{\log (sSFR/Gyr^{-1}) < -1}$，从而排除了遮蔽恒星形成的可能性。然后，我们使用光谱能量分布建模和改进的黑体拟合来估计尘埃质量，两种方法的结果一致。我们发现三个UMGs已演变为极端贫尘埃的静止星系，其$M_{\mathrm{dust}}/M_\star \lesssim 10^{-4}$，而ALMA探测到的星系具有相对较高的尘埃储库，$M_{\mathrm{dust}}/M_\star \sim 10^{-3}$。我们的结果展示了目前已知在$3 < z < 4$范围内质量最大且尘埃极少的经光谱确认的静止星系，为早期宇宙中快速尘埃移除和淬灭过程提供了宝贵的观测约束。未来的分子谱线观测对于直接测量气体含量和验证消耗过程的效率至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这是目前已知在$3<z<4$范围内最大质量且尘埃极少的静止星系，为早期宇宙中快速尘埃移除和淬灭过程提供了重要观测约束。未来需要分子谱线观测来直接测量气体含量。

title: The Perpendicularity of Dust Lanes and Radio Jets in Early-Type Galaxies: Implications for AGN Feedback
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, accepted to ApJ. See Figures 3 and 4 for main results and Figure 5 for interpretation
summary: The orientation of radio jets relative to their host galaxies offers an interesting avenue for probing the connection between active galactic nuclei (AGN) and their surroundings. Several studies have also investigated the orientation of nuclear dust features. We follow up on this previous work with newer Hubble Space Telescope imaging of early-type radio galaxies, and a largely automated process for measuring position angles. We classify the dust features as lanes, disks, or rings. Lanes are irregular structures that likely form from gas-rich minor mergers, while disks and rings are more well-defined and may form from settling lanes or internal mechanisms. We find that dust lanes do not have a preferred alignment relative to their host galaxies, but are preferentially perpendicular to the jets. In contrast, dust disks and rings tend to be closely aligned with the major axes of their host galaxies, but have varying orientations relative to the jets. Our results suggest that infalling dusty material from mergers can influence the angle of the radio jet. This would allow the jet orientation to change over time, and may help explain the role of AGN feedback in maintaining quiescence in massive galaxies.

AI.tldr: 早期型射电星系中尘埃特征与射电喷流相对取向的研究：尘埃带与喷流垂直，尘埃盘/环与星系主轴对齐，暗示并合物质影响喷流方向
AI.motivation: 研究射电喷流相对于宿主星系的取向，有助于探索活动星系核（AGN）与其周围环境的联系。前人研究过核区尘埃特征的取向，本文在此基础上使用更新的哈勃望远镜数据进一步探索。
AI.method: 使用哈勃太空望远镜对早期型射电星系进行成像观测，采用主要自动化的过程测量位置角。将尘埃特征分类为带（lanes）、盘（disks）或环（rings）。
AI.result: 尘埃带相对于宿主星系没有特定的对齐偏好，但倾向于垂直于射电喷流。相反，尘埃盘和环倾向于与宿主星系的主轴紧密对齐，但相对于喷流有不同的取向。
AI.conclusion: 来自并合的尘埃物质流入可以影响射电喷流的角度，使得喷流取向随时间变化。这有助于解释AGN反馈在维持大质量星系静止状态中的作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 射电喷流相对于其宿主星系的取向为探究活动星系核（AGN）与其周围环境的联系提供了一条有趣的途径。多项研究也探讨了核尘埃结构的取向。我们利用更新的哈勃空间望远镜对早期型射电星系的成像数据，并采用高度自动化的方法测量位置角，对先前的工作进行了跟进。我们将尘埃结构分类为尘埃带、尘埃盘或尘埃环。尘埃带是不规则结构，可能由富含气体的并合事件形成；而尘埃盘和环则更为规整，可能由尘埃带沉降或内部机制形成。我们发现尘埃带相对于宿主星系没有优先取向，但倾向于垂直于喷流。相比之下，尘埃盘和环倾向于与宿主星系的长轴紧密对齐，但相对于喷流的取向则各不相同。我们的结果表明，来自并合的富含尘埃的物质流入可以影响射电喷流的角度。这将使喷流取向随时间变化，并可能有助于解释AGN反馈在维持大质量星系静止状态中的作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：来自并合的尘埃物质流入可以影响射电喷流的角度，使得喷流取向随时间变化。这有助于解释AGN反馈在维持大质量星系静止状态中的作用。

title: Isotropic Equivalence of STVG--MOG and $Λ$CDM and Its Breakdown in Large--Scale Anisotropic Cosmological Observables
summary: We show that Scalar-Tensor-Vector Gravity (STVG-MOG) is observationally equivalent to the standard model $Λ$CDM cosmological model for all probes that depend on isotropic and linear gravitational dynamics, including galaxy rotation curves, cluster lensing, the linear matter power spectrum P(k), $σ_8$, baryon acoustic oscillations, and the cosmic microwave background (CMB). This degeneracy arises from the scale-dependent effective gravitational coupling $G_{\mathrm{eff}}$, which ensures identical background evolution, transfer functions, and linear growth. Consequently, all early-universe, low and intermediate scale cosmological observables are equally well described by STVG-MOG without invoking non-baryonic dark matter. We argue that the equivalence implies that isotropic cosmological data alone cannot establish the physical existence of dark matter. The degeneracy is broken only by observables sensitive to large-scale, anisotropic gravitational response. In particular, recent measurements of enhanced radio-galaxy and quasar number-count dipoles at gigaparsec scales probe a regime where $G_{\mathrm{eff}}$ departs from its $Λ$CDM limit, allowing STVG-MOG to generate anisotropic bulk flows, while preserving consistency with all isotropic constraints. These observations provide a concrete pathway for empirically distinguishing modified gravity from particle dark matter.

AI.tldr: STVG-MOG引力理论与ΛCDM模型在所有依赖各向同性线性引力动力学的观测探针上完全等效，包括星系旋转曲线、星系团引力透镜、线性物质功率谱、重子声学振荡和宇宙微波背景等。这种等效性源于尺度依赖的有效引力耦合常数Geff，使得两种理论具有相同的背景演化、转移函数和线性增长。因此，所有早期宇宙、低中尺度的宇宙学观测数据都无法区分这两种理论，无法仅凭各向同性数据证实暗物质的物理存在。等效性仅在大尺度各向异性引力响应观测中被打破，特别是千兆秒差距尺度的射电星系和类星体数量计数偶极子增强测量，为区分修正引力和粒子暗物质提供了具体途径。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在探讨STVG-MOG（标量-张量-矢量引力）理论与标准ΛCDM宇宙学模型之间的观测等效性问题。动机在于理解各向同性宇宙学数据是否能够真正证实暗物质的物理存在，以及如何通过特定观测来区分修正引力理论和粒子暗物质模型。
AI.method: 通过分析STVG-MOG理论中尺度依赖的有效引力耦合常数Geff的特性，证明该理论在背景演化、转移函数和线性增长方面与ΛCDM模型完全一致。系统比较了多种宇宙学观测探针，包括星系旋转曲线、星系团引力透镜、线性物质功率谱P(k)、σ8、重子声学振荡和宇宙微波背景等各向同性观测数据。
AI.result: 研究发现STVG-MOG与ΛCDM在所有依赖各向同性线性引力动力学的观测探针上完全等效，这意味着各向同性宇宙学数据本身无法证实暗物质的物理存在。等效性仅在大尺度各向异性引力响应观测中被打破，特别是千兆秒差距尺度的射电星系和类星体数量计数偶极子增强测量，这些观测对Geff偏离ΛCDM极限的敏感区域能够区分两种理论。
AI.conclusion: 各向同性宇宙学观测数据无法区分STVG-MOG修正引力理论和ΛCDM粒子暗物质模型，因此不能仅凭这些数据证实暗物质的物理存在。大尺度各向异性观测，特别是射电星系和类星体数量计数偶极子增强测量，为实证区分修正引力和粒子暗物质提供了具体途径。这些观测能够探测到Geff偏离ΛCDM极限的区域，从而打破两种理论之间的等效性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们证明，标量-张量-矢量引力（STVG-MOG）与标准模型ΛCDM宇宙学模型在所有依赖于各向同性和线性引力动力学的探测中观测等效，包括星系旋转曲线、星系团透镜、线性物质功率谱P(k)、σ_8、重子声学振荡以及宇宙微波背景（CMB）。这种简并源于尺度依赖的有效引力耦合G_{\mathrm{eff}}，它确保了相同的背景演化、传递函数和线性增长。因此，所有早期宇宙、低尺度和中等尺度的宇宙学观测都能被STVG-MOG同样好地描述，而无需引入非重子暗物质。我们认为，这种等效性意味着仅凭各向同性宇宙学数据无法确立暗物质的物理存在。这种简并只能被对大尺度各向异性引力响应敏感的观测所打破。特别是，最近在吉秒差距尺度上观测到的射电星系和类星体计数偶极子增强，探测到了G_{\mathrm{eff}}偏离其ΛCDM极限的区域，使得STVG-MOG能够产生各向异性整体流，同时保持与所有各向同性约束的一致性。这些观测为从经验上区分修正引力和粒子暗物质提供了具体途径。

title: G183: An outer galaxy filament feeding a massive protostar
comment: 16 pages Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: We present the first detailed multi-tracer observation of a 5-pc long outer Galaxy filament, G183, and the massive young stellar object (YSO) IRAS 05480+2545 associated with it. Using the IRAM 30-m telescope at lambda = 1.4 and 3 mm, we probed the molecular gas distribution at angular resolutions of ~12"-28" (0.1-0.3 pc at d = 2.1 kpc). The velocity-resolved C18O(1-0) observations conclusively show a main filament with a skeleton of ridges. The main filament is a 5 pc long velocity-coherent structure with a continuous and quiescent velocity field along its length up to the star-forming hub that accretes mass from the filament. The internal gas kinematics of most of the G183 filament is dominated by thermal motions (sigma_NT/cs~1) and large-scale velocity gradients arising due to outflows and accretion of matter in the massive YSO. The dispersion-size relation almost up to 1 pc is consistent with Larson's law, suggesting that the origin of the filament is a turbulence cascade. The massive YSO, S1, with no corresponding radio continuum detection is characterized as a high-mass protostellar object with a mass of 156 Msun and an M/L ratio of 0.04. We identify a kinematic signature of the accretion of material from the filament onto the YSO, S1. The rates of molecular gas accretion and entrainment in S1 are estimated to be 8.6 and 2.6 (in units of 10^-4 Msun/yr), respectively. In comparison to the inner Galaxy high-mass star-forming filaments forming massive stars, G183 has a lower column density; however, the accretion and outflow rates in S1 are similar. The detection of hydrocarbons such as CH3CN and HC3N indicates the presence of hot-core chemistry in S1. These results highlight the universality of physical processes involved in massive star formation across a range of Galactic environments.

AI.tldr: 首次对银河系外区5pc长丝状云G183及其大质量年轻恒星天体IRAS 05480+2545进行多示踪剂观测，揭示了丝状云结构、动力学特征以及与恒星形成的关联。
AI.motivation: 研究银河系外区大质量恒星形成过程，探索不同银河环境下的恒星形成物理机制是否具有普适性。
AI.method: 使用IRAM 30米望远镜在1.4和3毫米波段观测，角分辨率12"-28"，通过C18O(1-0)等分子谱线分析气体分布和运动学特征。
AI.result: G183丝状云是5pc长的速度相干结构，内部运动以热运动为主，符合Larson定律；发现大质量原恒星S1（156太阳质量），测得其吸积和喷流速率；检测到CH3CN和HC3N等碳氢化合物，表明存在热核化学。
AI.conclusion: 银河系外区与内区的大质量恒星形成过程具有相似的物理机制，包括丝状云结构、吸积过程和化学特征，体现了恒星形成物理过程的普适性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们首次对银河系外区一个5秒差距长的丝状云G183及其相关的巨年轻恒星体（YSO）IRAS 05480+2545进行了详细的多示踪观测。利用IRAM 30米望远镜在λ=1.4和3毫米波段，我们以约12"-28"（在d=2.1千秒差距处对应0.1-0.3秒差距）的角分辨率探测了分子气体分布。速度分辨的C18O(1-0)观测明确显示了一个具有脊骨架的主丝状云。该主丝状云是一个5秒差距长的速度相干结构，沿其长度方向具有连续且宁静的速度场，直至从丝状云吸积质量的恒星形成枢纽。G183丝状云大部分区域的内部气体运动学由热运动（σ_NT/cs~1）和大尺度速度梯度主导，后者由巨年轻恒星体中的外流和物质吸积引起。几乎达到1秒差距的色散-尺度关系与拉森定律一致，表明该丝状云的起源是湍流级联。巨年轻恒星体S1没有相应的射电连续谱探测，其特征是一个质量为156太阳质量、M/L比为0.04的高质量原恒星体。我们识别出物质从丝状云吸积到S1的运动学特征。S1中分子气体吸积和夹带率估计分别为8.6和2.6（单位为10^-4太阳质量/年）。与内银河系形成大质量恒星的高质量恒星形成丝状云相比，G183的柱密度较低；然而，S1中的吸积和外流率相似。检测到碳氢化合物如CH3CN和HC3N表明S1中存在热核化学。这些结果突显了在不同银河系环境中大质量恒星形成所涉及的物理过程的普遍性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，银河系外区与内区的大质量恒星形成过程具有相似的物理机制，包括丝状云结构、吸积过程和化学特征，体现了恒星形成物理过程的普适性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Continuum images of the G183 region. Left WISE 12 \(\mu\) m . Middle Herschel/PACS at 70 \(\mu\) m . ( Right: ) 250 \(\mu\) m SPIRE image (colour) with 350 \(\mu\) m SHARC image with a beam size of 8 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 5 as contours. Contour levels (Jy/beam) are 0.5, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12 to 30 in steps of 8. Continuum sources at 70 and 160 \(\mu\) m shown as white open squares and triangles, respectively. Class 1 and Class 2 sources from GLIMPSE360 are shown as inverted red triangles and white asterisks. The location of the massive YSO S1 is also marked for reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：G183区域的连续谱图像。左：WISE 12 \(\mu\) m。中：Herschel/PACS 70 \(\mu\) m。（右：）250 \(\mu\) m SPIRE图像（彩色）叠加350 \(\mu\) m SHARC图像，波束大小为8 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 5的等值线。等值线水平（Jy/波束）为0.5、2、4、6、8、10、12至30，步长为8。70和160 \(\mu\) m的连续谱源分别以白色空心方块和三角形表示。来自GLIMPSE360的Class 1和Class 2源以倒置红色三角形和白色星号表示。同时标出了巨年轻恒星体S1的位置以供参考。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Integrated intensity maps in the 3 mm band observed with the IRAM 30m telescope towards the G183 region. The colour plot in each panel is the integrated emission of C 18 O(1–0) and the contours correspond to molecular transitions, as is indicated above the panels in units of K km s -1 with step sizes in brackets. Above each panel the contour levels are given to the right. The intensities are integrated between velocities of -12 to -2 km s -1 , except for N 2 H + (1–0), which is integrated between -22 to 0 km s -1 . In the top left panel, the region mapped at 1.4 mm is shown by the smaller box. Positions selected for further analysis are shown as ’+’ in the bottom right panel and marked as S1 (0 ′′ , 0 ′′ ), S2(123 ′′ , -125 ′′ ) and S3 (-15 ′′ ,-96 ′′ ). The solid curve drawn on the C 18 O(1–0) map shows the direction in which the velocity analysis including the position-velocity diagram (Fig. 5 ) was done. The HPBW is shown on the lower right.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用IRAM 30米望远镜观测到的G183区域3毫米波段的积分强度图。每个面板中的彩色图是C18O(1–0)的积分发射，等值线对应分子跃迁，如面板上方所示，单位为K km s-1，括号内为步长。每个面板上方右侧给出了等值线水平。强度在-12至-2 km s-1的速度范围内积分，但N2H+(1–0)除外，其在-22至0 km s-1范围内积分。左上方面板中，1.4毫米波段映射的区域由较小方框显示。用于进一步分析的位置在右下方面板中以'+'表示，并标记为S1 (0 ′′ , 0 ′′ )、S2(123 ′′ , -125 ′′ )和S3 (-15 ′′ ,-96 ′′ )。C18O(1–0)图上绘制的实曲线显示了进行速度分析（包括位置-速度图，图5）的方向。HPBW显示在右下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Integrated intensity maps of HC 3 N and CH 3 CN in the 3 mm band observed with the IRAM 30m telescope. Observations covered the region shown in Fig. 2 but emission in these lines was only detected in the inner region shown here. The colour plot in each panel is the integrated emission of C 18 O(1–0) and contours correspond to molecular transitions as indicated above the panels. The intensities are integrated between velocities of -20 to 0 km s -1 . Contour levels in units of (K km s -1 ) are indicated at the top of the panels. The HPBW is shown on the lower right.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：使用IRAM 30米望远镜观测到的3毫米波段HC3N和CH3CN的积分强度图。观测覆盖了图2所示的区域，但这些谱线的发射仅在此处显示的内部区域被探测到。每个面板中的彩色图是C18O(1–0)的积分发射，等值线对应分子跃迁，如面板上方所示。强度在-20至0 km s-1的速度范围内积分。等值线水平（单位为K km s-1）在面板顶部标出。HPBW显示在右下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Integrated intensity maps at 1.4 mm observed with the IRAM 30m telescope towards the G183 region. The colour plot in each panel is the integrated emission of C 18 O(2–1) and the contours correspond to molecular transitions, as is indicated above the panels. The intensities are integrated between velocities of -20 to 0 km s -1 . The HPBW is shown on the lower right.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用IRAM 30米望远镜观测到的G183区域1.4毫米波段的积分强度图。每个面板中的彩色图是C18O(2–1)的积分发射，等值线对应分子跃迁，如面板上方所示。强度在-20至0 km s-1的速度范围内积分。HPBW显示在右下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Position-velocity diagram for C 18 O, 13 CO(1–0) and CO, 13 CO(2–1) emission along the cut shown in Fig. 2 . The dashed blue lines are drawn at -9 km s -1 to guide the eye.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：沿图2所示切线的C18O、13CO(1–0)和CO、13CO(2–1)发射的位置-速度图。蓝色虚线画在-9 km s-1处以引导视线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Velocity-coherent skeletons (left) and spines (right) identified using the automated tool CRISPY applied to the C 18 O(1–0) datacube. A skeleton is defined as a ridge that has been gridded onto an image and a spine as a skeleton with all its branches removed. The greyscale image in each panel corresponds to the intensity map of C 18 O(1–0) integrated over -11 to -4 km s -1 with S/N ratio \(>5\) . The continuously changing velocity centroids along the filaments are marked in different colours and the values are mentioned in the left panels. The triangle and ’+’ mark the positions of the 70 \(\mu\) m and 160 \(\mu\) m continuum sources, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：使用自动工具CRISPY应用于C18O(1–0)数据立方体识别的速度相干骨架（左）和脊线（右）。骨架定义为已网格化到图像上的脊线，脊线定义为移除所有分支后的骨架。每个面板中的灰度图像对应于C18O(1–0)在-11至-4 km s-1范围内积分、信噪比\(>5\)的强度图。沿丝状云连续变化的速度质心以不同颜色标记，数值在左侧面板中给出。三角形和'+'分别标记70 \(\mu\) m和160 \(\mu\) m连续谱源的位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Comparison of spectra at selected positions (Fig. 2 ) in G183. Panels in top, middle, and bottom rows correspond to positions S1, S2, and S3 with offsets (in arcseconds) (0,0), (-15,-96), and (123,-125) respectively. All 3 mm spectra are convolved to a common resolution of 28 ′′ , while the 1.4 mm spectra are convolved to a resolution of 14 ′′ . CO(3–2) has a native resolution of 15 ′′ . The vertical dashed line in the top row of the middle column panel shows the velocity ranges chosen for analysis of the blue and red wings of the spectra.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：G183中选定位置（图2）的谱线比较。上、中、下行的面板分别对应位置S1、S2和S3，偏移量（以角秒为单位）分别为(0,0)、(-15,-96)和(123,-125)。所有3毫米谱线卷积至28 ′′ 的共同分辨率，而1.4毫米谱线卷积至14 ′′ 的分辨率。CO(3–2)的原始分辨率为15 ′′ 。中列面板顶行的垂直虚线显示了为分析谱线蓝翼和红翼所选的速度范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : Comparison of spectra of the outflow tracers H 2 CO(3–2), SO(5 6 – \(4_{5}\) ), and SO(5 5 – \(4_{4}\) ) at S1.
